name: Terrain Token
description: Terrain Token ($TRN) is the incentive layer of the Terrain Ecosystem — a stormwater infrastructure protocol on Solana Token-2022 with a fixed 1.25B supply. Tied to Carolina Terrain LLC, a licensed NC drainage contractor (CL.1872). $TRN is a utility/incentive token. It is not an investment, not a security, and carries no promise of profit or yield.
